metadata.description: AIR OS plugin/skill catalog (E:\-7-) — shareable Claude Code plugins and skills, kept separate from the private runtime/models on E:\-4-.

plugins.name: site-builder
plugins.description: Brief-in, website-out: dynamic Next.js site scaffolder with vendored UI/UX Pro Max design skills + 21st.dev Magic MCP + Framer Motion.

plugins.name: markitdown
plugins.description: Convert PDFs/Office docs/images to Markdown locally before reading them into the model — save tokens, keep sensitive files off cloud extractors. Recipe wrapping the local MarkItDown install (E:\-4-).

plugins.name: bip-monitor
plugins.description: Triage your own BiP work chats with a local LLM, learning from the owner's corrections. Reads chats by attaching to BiP Desktop over CDP (chat list is strictly read-only; opening a conversation is opt-in because it sends read receipts), applies learned rules deterministically, and keeps message texts out of git and out of the knowledge vault. Sending is one message per explicit command — no autoreplies.

plugins._moved: llm-queue переехал 2026-07-23 в приватный маркетплейс air-runtime (репозиторий ruhorh66-rgb/llm-queue, каталог E:\-8-\llm-queue). Причина: очередь стала управлять и локальной CPU-нагрузкой, а сколько ядер машина может отдать и какие сервисы на ней падают при насыщении — описание инфраструктуры, а не публичный рецепт. История публичной версии остаётся в этом репозитории.

plugins.name: air-pipeline
plugins.description: AIR OS knowledge-pipeline skills. v0.1 ships idea-card: atomic cross-project Idea Cards in 002_Ideas_Wiki with the mandatory relevance gate. Other pipeline steps roadmapped (need their source procedures).
